# 🔌 OHANNA API Server

This directory houses the backend Express.js API server for the **OHANNA** Egyptian Streetwear e-commerce platform.

---

## 🛠️ Core Technologies

* **Runtime & Language**: Node.js, TypeScript
* **Web Framework**: Express.js (v5.x)
* **Request Validation**: Zod
* **Structured Logging**: Pino
* **Payment Engine**: Stripe SDK with local mock fallback
* **Autogenerated Bindings**: Orval OpenAPI codegen engine

---

## 📁 Project Directory Layout

```
api-server/
├── src/
│   ├── api/              # Autogenerated API schema TS definitions
│   ├── db/               # PostgreSQL & Drizzle schemas (future state)
│   ├── lib/              # Modules (env loading, stripe client, logger)
│   ├── middlewares/      # Express filters (validation, request-logger, errors)
│   ├── routes/           # Request controller endpoints
│   ├── app.ts            # App initialization configs
│   └── index.ts          # Server entry point
├── api-spec/             # OpenAPI Specifications (Json, Yaml & Orval configs)
└── build.mjs             # Compilation config (esbuild runner)
```

---

## 🧭 Developer Guides

To avoid information redundancy, all installation scripts, configuration environment variables, API endpoint references, and server deployment steps are documented in the central guides:

* 🛠️ **[Local Setup & Running Guides](../docs/SETUP.md)**: Steps to install dependencies, run development commands, and resolve setup issues.
* 🔌 **[Definitive API Endpoint Spec](../docs/API.md)**: Full index of endpoint formats, request validation schemas, sample payloads, and curl testing commands.
* 📐 **[System Architecture](../docs/ARCHITECTURE.md)**: In-depth request lifecycle flows, data models, and type safety constraints.
* 🚀 **[Server Deployment & Admin](../docs/DEPLOYMENT.md)**: Docker containerization profiles, Cloud service mappings, and backup configurations.
